title: NT's Utility Modpack and FPS Boost
description: A great option for low-end computers, boosts fps and if you have a a decent gpu this can make it so you can run BSL shaders at max settings with no struggle!
body: This modpack contains multiple FPS boosting mods and a few quality of life mods such as essentials and REI and more. Run at a smooth 60 fps or higher if you are feeling spicy. YOu can run shaders at high fps at low struggle. If you enjoy it please share this to your friends and family! (Note still in ALPHA stages, If you have any problems please DM me on discord @nt242 or find me on the modrinth discord!) (UPDATE Please enable Vsync as people have DM'd me saying their GPU is behaving weirdly , if you are getting below than normal FPS disable Vsync and set FPS limit about 10 to 20 FPS more than your default Vsync settings!)
